{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Uncrowned King tournament prize
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The prize for passing the first round of the [[Uncrowned]] [[King]] tournament is a custom-designed floating fortress.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
